text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While watching Kawakami Princess's training
footage in my room, I consider my options
carefully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How should I have her run in her debut race... or
rather, in all her races from this point on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The footage comes from another scrimmage I
entered her in recently.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Huh? Aghhh?!
choice_data_list: (She's losing her form again...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In practice, she has no trouble coming out of the
gate, and her form is impeccable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as soon as she's faced with an actual "race,"
even if it's only a scrimmage, everything seems to
fall apart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her whole body suddenly seizes up like a machine
that hasn't been oiled. She puts all her strength
into each step, but it only makes her movements
heavy. And I think I know the reason why...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: She's overexerting herself.
choice_data_list: Tazuna?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wah?! I'm very sorry. I called out to you, and you
said I could come in, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must have been so absorbed in watching the
footage that I replied to Tazuna without realizing
it.
choice_data_list: No, I should be the one apologizing.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I can understand why you'd be
concerned seeing Kawakami Princess in that
state.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That kind of overexertion puts a lot of strain on
the body. She could hurt herself like that.
choice_data_list: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And injuries aren't the only thing I'm worried
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still a bit tense, and ends up building up a
lot of tension in her shoulders. If she keeps
running with this stiff form...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's highly likely that tendency will become a
habit.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you enter her into a big race as she is right now,
it's only going to make her even more tense.
choice_data_list: ...I agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Kawakami Princess, just the notion of
entering a big race might seem like realizing a
long-awaited dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it's far too early for her to set her sights
on the big stage. I have to think about her future.
choice_data_list: (What would be best for her?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has come for Kawakami Princess to make
her debut.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's gooo! I'm all warmed up and bursting with
energy! I'm going to get out there and run rings
around everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I have to become super strong—just like Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, during my junior year, I want to
run in the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, and then blast
down the G1 path!
choice_data_list: (But those G1 races are the problem...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To Kawakami Princess, G1 races must represent
everything she seeks—challenges where she can
face the ultimate rivals and become like her ideal,
Princess Fighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And many of those G1 races can only be entered
during the junior and classic years.
choice_data_list: (But still...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer, it's time for a strategy
meeting! I'll carry out any plan you come up with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me, her eyes beaming with
anticipation. But what I'm about to tell her will
likely betray her hopes.
choice_data_list: I want to discuss our plans for after your debut.
I want to discuss our plans for after your debut.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I'm glad that you're so forward thinking,
too, Trainer! Please continue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her starry eyes pierce through my core. But since
I'm the person who must help shoulder her
dream...
choice_data_list:
I've been thinking about how to achieve our
future goals together.

I've been thinking about how to achieve our
future goals together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Future... Gulp. Then you mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I want her to have a healthy career, I have to
tell her this clearly.
choice_data_list: I don't want to aim for the G1 races right now.
I don't want to aim for the G1 races right now.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You... you don't? Then, um, that means...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You don't think I have the potential to become a
G1 Umamusume?
choice_data_list: That's not what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You're still developing as a runner.
You're still developing as a runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her about the problems she currently
exhibits while running and explain that we should
gain more experience before shooting for G1
titles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I won't rule out entering G1 races entirely, but
setting them as our objective would overburden
her with the pressure to win.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I understand!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The Tiara is the princess's crown, obtainable only
from the grandest of stages—the G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And I always envisioned myself competing
fiercely in the Tiara tour, awakening my potential
on the field of battle just like Princess Fighter.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But at the end of the day, I am my own person!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I may look up to Princess Fighter, but my true
goal is to become my own ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So if you think it's for my benefit, Trainer, then I'll
happily start with any objective, no matter how
small.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you don't mind?
Are you sure you don't mind?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes. So keep a good eye on me from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm taking my first step on the road to
becoming a princess.
choice_data_list: And I won't miss a moment of it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I'm actually so relieved, Trainer.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(You're different from anyone I met when I was a
child. I can just sense that you have what it takes
to become the Legendary Trainer.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(You truly believe from the bottom of your heart
that I can be my ideal princess!)
